subcodes.first_line: Blessed is He Who hath spoken amidst the worlds and caused them that draw nigh to make mention of His Most Great Name. Verily, He is [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تبارک الذی نطق بین العالم و انطق المقربین الی ذکر اسمه الاعظم انه لهو
subcodes.subjects: @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @thankfulness; gratitude, @spiritual transformation, @the power of words; of speech, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
